old_claim.note: Early Electrical Appliances is an earlier historical predecessor or foundation, not a one-to-one engineering dependency.

new_claim.note: The DOMELRE used an AC motor for household electrical operation, making motorized electric drive a direct device dependency.

source_shape.source_locator: ASHRAE lists DOMELRE's repulsion-start induction AC motor and states the unit could be plugged into household electrical circuits.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The source supports an electric motor as a direct component of the household electric refrigerator.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: Early electrical appliances are a broad category; electric_motor is the direct mechanism needed by the scoped device.

ontology_before: Household Electric Refrigerators depended on the broad Early Electrical Appliances category.
ontology_after: Household Electric Refrigerators depends directly on Electric Motor and Mechanical Refrigeration.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed: electrical_appliances_early is replaced by electric_motor.
would_reject_if: The node is broadened to appliance retail networks rather than device construction.
A dedicated electric_compressor node is added and should replace electric_motor.
A stronger source shows the represented household units were non-electric absorption refrigerators.
short_reason: The electric motor is the direct device dependency.
